title: Kitchen Scissors with Sharp Stainless Steel Blades and Soft Handles, Multifunctional Scissors Set, 3PCs, Black/Grey
features: The blades of the scissors set are made of food grade 2CR13, which is strong and not easy to rust. The handle is a high quality rubber and plastic handle. The inner ring made of rubber is soft and comfortable to grip, thereby achieving precise control and improved cutting efficiency. Multifunctional combined scissors, the blade is firmly embedded in the handle to avoid separation and damage.

Highly durable multifunctional scissors: The thickness of the blade is 2.5 mm and it will not bend or deform. The thickness of the 8 inch scissors and the 5.5 inch blades is 2 mm each, and the blades are finely polished and very sharp. Can easily cut paper, photo paper, fabric, thread, etc. Suitable for daily use at home and in the office.

About the product size: Multifunctional scissors: 8.5 inches, cutting piece length 9 cm, maximum opening 14 cm. 8-Inch Scissors: 8 inches, the length of the cutting piece is 10 cm, the maximum opening is 15.5 cm. 5.5 inch small scissors: 5.5 inches, the length of the cutting piece is 6 cm, and the maximum opening is 11.5 cm.
